title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_layers.py (第 261 至 570 行，共 570 行) ---
 261 |                         self.item_index[item_id] = item_file
 262 | 
 263 |                         keywords = self._extract_item_keywords(data)
 264 |                         for keyword in keywords:
 265 |                             if keyword not in self.item_inverted_index:
 266 |                                 self.item_inverted_index[keyword] = []
 267 |                             if item_id not in self.item_inverted_index[keyword]:
 268 |                                 self.item_inverted_index[keyword].append(item_id)
 269 |             except Exception as e:
 270 |                 print(f"⚠️ 重建 MemoryItem 索引时跳过文件 {item_file}: {e}")
 271 | 
 272 |         # 保存索引
 273 |         self._save_index()
 274 | 
 275 |     def _extract_keywords(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[str]:
 276 |         """从摘要数据中提取关键词"""
 277 |         keywords = []
 278 | 
 279 |         # 从摘要文本中提取
 280 |         summary_text = data.get("summary_text", "")
 281 |         keywords.extend(self._tokenize(summary_text))
 282 | 
 283 |         # 从任务目标中提取
 284 |         task_goal = data.get("task_goal", "")
 285 |         keywords.extend(self._tokenize(task_goal))
 286 | 
 287 |         # 从文件路径中提取
 288 |         files_changed = data.get("files_changed", [])
 289 |         for fc in files_changed:
 290 |             if not isinstance(fc, dict):
 291 |                 continue
 292 |             # FileChange 当前规范字段是 path；兼容旧数据中可能存在的 file_path
 293 |             file_path = fc.get("path") or fc.get("file_path", "")
 294 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(file_path))
 295 | 
 296 |         return list(set(keywords))
 297 | 
 298 |     def _extract_item_keywords(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[str]:
 299 |         """从 MemoryItem 数据中提取关键词。"""
 300 |         keywords = []
 301 | 
 302 |         for field_name in ("kind", "type", "title", "content", "project", "status"):
 303 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(str(data.get(field_name, ""))))
 304 | 
 305 |         for concept in data.get("concepts", []):
 306 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(str(concept)))
 307 | 
 308 |         for file_path in data.get("files", []):
 309 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(str(file_path)))
 310 | 
 311 |         for session_id in data.get("source_session_ids", []):
 312 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(str(session_id)))
 313 | 
 314 |         return list(set(keywords))
 315 | 
 316 |     def _tokenize(self, text: str) -> List[str]:
 317 |         """简单分词（支持中英文）"""
 318 |         import re
 319 | 
 320 |         # 英文/路径片段：保留下划线文件名（如 memory_layers），同时拆分为普通英文词
 321 |         raw_words = re.findall(r'\b[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]{1,}\b', text.lower())
 322 |         words = []
 323 |         for word in raw_words:
 324 |             words.append(word)
 325 |             words.extend(part for part in word.split('_') if len(part) >= 2)
 326 | 
 327 |         # 中文分词（简单实现：提取 2-3 字的片段）
 328 |         # 注意：这是简化版本，实际应用中应使用 jieba 等分词工具
 329 |         chinese_2char = re.findall(r'[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{2}', text)
 330 |         chinese_3char = re.findall(r'[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{3}', text)
 331 | 
 332 |         # 合并并去重
 333 |         chinese = list(set(chinese_2char + chinese_3char))
 334 | 
 335 |         return words + chinese
 336 | 
 337 |     def store(self, summary: SessionSummary) -> str:
 338 |         """
 339 |         存储摘要到长期记忆
 340 | 
 341 |         Args:
 342 |             summary: 会话摘要
 343 | 
 344 |         Returns:
 345 |             存储的文件路径
 346 |         """
 347 |         # 生成文件名
 348 |         timestamp = summary.timestamp.replace(":", "-").replace(" ", "_")
 349 |         filename = f"summary_{summary.session_id}_{timestamp}.json"
 350 |         file_path = self.storage_dir / filename
 351 | 
 352 |         # 保存到磁盘
 353 |         try:
 354 |             with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 355 |                 json.dump(summary.to_dict(), f, ensure...
